title: Realistically Irritatingly Difficult
description: real life in minecraft with things like nukes, depression, water, temperature, and even the moon
body:
# **basicly adds real life to minecraft (not finished tho)**

## **recomended to be played in hardcore if you want to get deprssion irl**

## **major mods:**

ad astra

cold sweat

create

farmes delight 

critters and companyons

first aids

natures spirit

no tree punch

shineels bandeges

overgeared

## **stuff nobody asked for:**

temprature

water

body health

realistic forging

nukes

mental health

heart attacks

air

## **stuff i plan to add:**

nether burning
